title: EN 1993-1-8:2005 Bolt Group Capacity
description: Design bolt groups in accordance with EN 1993-1-8:2005.

shape.description: Bolt Pattern. Symbol: \text{Pattern}. Bolt Pattern Shape.

diameter.description: Diameter. Symbol: \text{Diameter}. Units: mm. The diameter of the bolt pattern.

angle.description: Rotation. Symbol: \text{Angle}. Units: °. Angle to rotate the bolt pattern by. 0 degrees is defined to have a bolt at the top of the center of the circle.

circular_bolts.description: No. Bolts. Symbol: n_b. The number of bolts in the circular pattern.

x_s.description: xs. Symbol: x_{s}. Units: mm. Spacing of bolts in the X direction.

y_s.description: ys. Symbol: y_{s}. Units: mm. Spacing of bolts in the Y direction.

x_bolts.description: No. Bolts in X. Symbol: n_{bx}. The number of bolts in the X direction

y_bolts.description: No. Bolts in Y. Symbol: n_{by}. The number of bolts in the Y direction

bolts_table.description: Bolt Coordinates. Coordinates of all bolts to be considered.

e_x.description: Edge Distance (X). Symbol: e_x. Units: mm. Min spacing between bolts and plate edge in X direction.

e_y.description: Edge Distance (Y). Symbol: e_y. Units: mm. Min spacing between bolts and plate edge in Y direction.

plate_width.description: Plate Width (W). Symbol: W. Units: mm. Total Width of the plate (length in X).

plate_height.description: Plate Height (H). Symbol: H. Units: mm. Total Height of the plate (length in Y).

t.description: Plate Thickness (t). Symbol: t. Units: mm. Thickness of smallest steel plate in the connection.

grade.description: Bolt Grade. Symbol: \text{Grade}. Bolt Grade is related to the ultimate tensile strength (fub) of the bolt (see EN 1993-1-8:2005 Table 3.1). It is also related to alpha v factor for ductility.

f_ub.description: fub. Symbol: f_{ub}. Units: MPa. Ultimate tensile strength of bolt (see EN 1993-1-8:2005 Table 3.1). Related to grade of bolt.

shear_plane.description: Shear Plane. Symbol: \text{Shear Plane}. Specify if the plane in which the bolts are sheared passes through the shank or the threaded portion of the bolt. The threaded portion has a smaller cross-sectional area and may be selected for a conservative design.

countersunk.description: Countersunk. Symbol: \text{Countersunk?}. Countersunk bolts have a reduced tensile capacity captured in the k2 factor (see EN 1993-1-8:2005 Table 3.4).

countersunk_depth.description: Countersunk Depth. Symbol: t_{cs}. Units: mm. Depth that bolt is countersunk into the steel plate.

t_p.description: Packing Thickness. Symbol: t_{p}. Units: mm. Thickness of any packing. Required for shear strength reduction given in Cl 3.6.1 (12) EN 1993-1-8:2005

plate_grade.description: Plate Grade. Symbol: \text{Plate Grade}. Plate Grade is related to the ultimate tensile strength (fu) of the plate (see Table 3.1 of EN1993-1-1).

f_y.description: fy. Symbol: f_{y}. Units: MPa. Yield strength of the steel plate (see EN 1993-1-1:2005 Table 3.1).

f_u.description: fu. Symbol: f_{u}. Units: MPa. Ultimate tensile strength of the steel plate (see EN 1993-1-1:2005 Table 3.1).

hole.description: Hole Type. Symbol: \text{Hole}. Bolt Hole Type. Slotted holes only available for rectangular bolt pattern.

clearance.description: Nominal Hole Clearance. Symbol: clearance. Units: mm. Nominal hole clearance for bolts as specified in BS-EN-1090-2 Table 11

d_o.description: Hole Size (do). Symbol: d_o. Units: mm. Size of hole.

d_l.description: Slot Length. Symbol: L. Units: mm. Length of slotted hole.

corrosion.description: Exposure. Symbol: \text{Exposure}. If exposed to the weather of other corrosive influences select exposed. See Table 3.3 of EN 1993-1-8 for more information.

corrosion_grade.description: Steel Standard. Symbol: \text{Steel Standard}. Steel grade conforms to EN 10025-5. See Table 3.3 of EN 1993-1-8 for more information.

plate_connection_type.description: Plate Support. Symbol: \text{Support}. Number of plates that are connected to the plate being considered in design. Used for assessing block shear requirements.

gamma_m0.description: Partial Safety Factor (γM0). Symbol: γ_{M0}. Partial Safety Factor required for block shear assessment. Typically 1.00 but may be different for different National Annex.

gamma_m2.description: Partial Safety Factor (γM2). Symbol: γ_{M2}. Partial Safety Factor. Typically 1.25 but may be different for different National Annex.

analysis.description: Analysis Method. Symbol: \text{Analysis}. Analysis method for calculating tensile/compressive forces on bolts resulting from out-of-plane moments.

prying_method.description: Prying Analysis. Symbol: \text{Prying}. Method for calculating the impact of prying on tensile loads. Must be supplied as simplified factor for circular and custom bolting arrangements.

prying_factor.description: Prying Factor (p). Symbol: p. Factor to account for prying effect by increasing tensile loads. A value of 1.1 is recommended for rigid plates and a value of 1.2 to 1.4 is recommended for flexible plates in the Australian Guidebook for Structural Engineers.

stub_thickness.description: Stub Thickness. Symbol: t_{stub}. Units: mm. Thickness of stub in inches considered for prying action calculation.

connection_type.description: Connection Type. Symbol: \text{Connection}. Type of plate required to determine effective length in prying check.

stub_weld.description: Stub Weld Size. Symbol: s. Units: mm. Leg length of weld between stub and plate.

Fx.description: F*x. Symbol: F^*_x. Units: kN. Applied design action along X-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

Fy.description: F*y. Symbol: F^*_y. Units: kN. Applied design action along Y-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

Fz.description: F*z. Symbol: F^*_z. Units: kN. Applied design action along Z-axis. A positive value is considered to apply tension to the bolts. A negative value is considered to apply compression.

Mx.description: M*x. Symbol: M^*_x. Units: kN-m. Design moment about X-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

My.description: M*y. Symbol: M^*_y. Units: kN-m. Design moment about Y-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

Mz.description: M*z. Symbol: M^*_z. Units: kN-m. Design moment about Z-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

graph_on.description: Show Stress Graphs. Toggle on/off to show stress graphs in reporting. Disabling stress graphs will result in quicker solve times.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
